subject: docs(claude): add wrap + cold meta sweeps
body:
- `wrap` / `wrp` — wrap-up pass covering the four post-change polish
  questions (double-check/strengthen/improve, discovered/assumed/skipped,
  cleanup/update/tighten, note/document/clarify).
- `cold` / `cld` — fresh-eyes branch audit. Re-reads CLAUDE.md from
  scratch, reviews every change on the branch as if in a new session
  with no context. Default scope is `branch`. Outputs findings with a
  fix plan per item.

Meta sweeps: 5 → 7.

Tags: documentation, triggers, claude-md
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: triggers-redesign
Semver: minor
